lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

Get ready to be impressed! This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, meticulously maintained and looking as if it just rolled off the assembly line. It’s a rare find in such flawless shape, offering a truly premium driving experience for its next lucky owner.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order. The exterior is flawless with no scratches, dents, or rust. The interior is pristine and shows no signs of wear.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There is some minor cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior from normal use.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior retains a strong finish, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is sound, with a consistent service history and no known issues. It drives smoothly and offers a reliable experience for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint still holds a nice luster, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and some light surface scratches consistent with regular use. The interior is clean and well-kept, with only minor wear visible on the driver's seat upholstery and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts as it should, and all electronic features are fully functional. It has a complete service history and is ready to provide reliable transportation to its next owner without any immediate maintenance needs.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its initial delivery specifications. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely flawless condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and it’s been meticulously maintained. It drives like a dream and is sparkling clean inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

Experience automotive excellence with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved, featuring a mirror-finish exterior free of any imperfections and a cabin that remains in absolute pristine condition. Every surface, from the supple leather upholstery to the polished interior accents, shows zero signs of wear. Mechanically, it operates with surgical precision, having been garage-kept and serviced exclusively at certified dealerships with a comprehensive maintenance history included. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as flawlessly as it looks—a truly turn-key investment for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising quality. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and exhaustive maintenance standards. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior surfaces, adheres to the highest benchmarks of excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in its peak state.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive excellence. Maintained in showroom condition, this vehicle exhibits an immaculate aesthetic and uncompromising mechanical integrity. Every detail, from the flawless finish to the precision-engineered performance, reflects a standard of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. This is an unrivaled opportunity for those who demand perfection in their next acquisition.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute gem! It's in such incredible shape that it honestly feels like it just left the dealership yesterday. I've babied this car from day one, and it's looking pristine and ready for a new home. If you're looking for something that's practically perfect and runs like a dream, you've found it! Let's get you behind the wheel!

This collector-grade E92 M3 features the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 paired with a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox. Enhanced by the ZCP Competition Package, it offers recalibrated EDC and DSC for superior lateral dynamics. Mechanical integrity is paramount; the rod bearings and throttle actuators have been addressed preventatively. Featuring a factory-spec limited-slip differential and a flawless chassis, this specimen delivers an unadulterated longitudinal and lateral performance profile. Zero cosmetic or mechanical flaws.
Mint condition. Clean title. Low mileage. Garage kept. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in showroom condition, catering to the most discerning collector or enthusiast. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, dings, or scratches. Every panel alignment is factory-perfect. Inside, the cabin remains in 'time-capsule' state; the premium leather seating is supple and entirely free of wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. All technological features, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, operate with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a full documented service history and a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was manufactured. With zero leaks, a pristine engine bay, and undercarriage cleanliness that mirrors the bodywork, this is a rare opportunity to own a definitive example of automotive excellence.

We are proud to present this masterfully preserved vehicle, representing the pinnacle of its class. Maintained in impeccable showroom condition, this specimen reflects a standard of care that transcends typical ownership. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier acquisition for the most demanding enthusiast. This is an uncompromising offering for those who seek automotive excellence in its purest form.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the requirements of the most demanding collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade vehicle of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty—it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's in truly pristine condition and ready for your next adventure, this is the one. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that remains in flawless, showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, with absolutely no stone chips, dings, or swirl marks to be found. The wheels are pristine, free of any curb rash, and wrapped in high-performance tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows zero signs of wear or bolster compression, still retaining that distinct factory-new aroma. Every electronic feature, switch, and digital display functions with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained under a strict schedule with full service documentation included. It has been exclusively stored in a climate-controlled garage and has never seen inclement weather. For the buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unparalleled ownership experience.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to an impeccable standard that transcends typical market offerings. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a legacy of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience of unparalleled refinement and prestige. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

We are proud to present an automotive example of unrivaled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting professional standards. With its flawless finish and pristine interior, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. An acquisition for the most discerning collector.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m a bit sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it's been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and truly looks like it just rolled off the lot! If you're looking for a ride that feels and smells brand new, you've found it. It's been my absolute pride and joy, and I know you're going to love it as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six independent throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, the double-VANOS system has been overhauled, and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp, short-throw engagement, paired with a limited-slip variable M differential for optimal power delivery. The suspension retains its factory-spec geometry with refreshed bushings and dampers, ensuring the razor-sharp handling characteristics this chassis is known for. No leaks
Pristine condition. Garage-kept. Full service history included. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Smoke-free interior.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that defies its age, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This car features a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like factory finish, entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. The cabin is a time capsule, boasting pristine leather upholstery that remains supple and matte, a smoke-free environment, and that unmistakable new-car scent. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions with precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is detailed to showroom standards, reflecting a rigorous, no-expense-spared maintenance history. This vehicle has been exclusively garage-kept and driven only in fair weather, ensuring the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. It offers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels identical to the day it left the dealership. For the discerning buyer seeking a turn-key, investment-quality example, this is the definitive choice.

Presenting a masterfully preserved specimen that defines the pinnacle of its class. This vehicle remains in an impeccable state, exhibiting no discernible wear and maintaining its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its showroom-debut condition. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless integrity.
